name_en: Burberry [Model 0621] Top-tier original-style tote bag inspired by a classic collection. Selected canvas with quilted leather trim and visible stitching. Front pocket decorated with brand logo. Can be carried by the reinforced leather handle or with the detachable shoulder strap.
name_cn:
Burberry [Model 0621] Top-tier original-style tote bag inspired by a classic collection. Selected canvas with quilted leather trim and visible stitching. Front pocket decorated with brand logo. Can be carried by the reinforced leather handle or with the detachable shoulder strap.
Dimensions: 23 x 6 x 26.5 cm
Lining: 92% cotton, 8% polyurethane
